reason: This configuration aims to tackle the primary challenges identified in the EDA. We use `weighted_bce` (Finding 1) to mitigate the severe taxonomic imbalance, ensuring that the macro AUC is not disproportionately dragged down by poorly-modeled non-bird classes. We employ `mixup` (Finding 4) to synthesize multi-label examples, directly addressing the shift from monophonic focal recordings to dense, multi-species soundscapes in the test set. Finally, setting `GEO_SCALE_KM` to 700 km provides an aggressive, yet distinct, weighting toward the Pantanal region (Finding 5), improving domain generalization.
